description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages test and deploy, using the docker.io/jangorecki/r-builder image and setting the provided _R_CHECK_* variables. In the test stage add a linux-release job (tagged linux) that runs the following script lines in order: Rscript -e 'dcf<-read.dcf("DESCRIPTION", c("Depends", "Imports", "LinkingTo", "Suggests")); pkgs<-setdiff(trimws(sapply(strsplit(trimws(unlist(strsplit(dcf[!is.na(dcf)], ",", fixed=TRUE))), "(", fixed=TRUE), `[[`, 1L)), c("R", rownames(installed.packages(priority="base")))); if (length(pkgs)) install.packages(pkgs, repos="https://cran.rstudio.com/", method="curl")', R CMD build ., PKG_TARBALL=$(ls -1t *.tar.gz | head -n 1), R CMD check --as-cran $PKG_TARBALL, mkdir -p checks/linux-release, mkdir -p /tmp/library, R CMD INSTALL --html --library=/tmp/library $PKG_TARBALL, mv /tmp/library/$(echo $PKG_TARBALL | cut -d _ -f 1)/html checks/linux-release, mv $(find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.Rcheck' -type d) checks/linux-release, mv $PKG_TARBALL checks/linux-release; archive the checks directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job (tagged linux, only on the master branch) that creates a public directory, installs the latest built package with R CMD INSTALL $(ls -1t checks/linux-release/*.tar.gz | head -n 1), and runs Rscript -e 'openCRAN::insertRelease("checks", repodir=normalizePath("public"), action="prune")'; publish the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact. Both jobs share the same Docker image and respect the defined R check environment variables.
